steps.title: Build the linear equation from initial height and rate
steps.content:
The car starts at height 15 feet. It rises at 8 feet per second, meaning after each second of time $s$, the height increases by $8s$ feet total. Therefore:
$$h = \text{initial height} + \text{total rise} = 15 + 8s$$
Rewriting in standard form:
$$h = 8s + 15$$
That confirms A is correct.
